name: Vessel Deck Container Placement - CR3
content: Each container now has an associated priority value. Instead of requiring all containers to be placed, the model may choose a subset of containers to load. The objective is to maximize the total value of loaded containers while respecting deck-boundary, non-overlap, and class-separation constraints among loaded containers.
value_info: `classes`: List[int], class index (1-based) of each container.
`separation`: 2D List[int], minimum pairwise class separation matrix.
`priority`: List[int], value contributed if the corresponding container is loaded.

var1.descr: `x`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left x-coordinate for each container (relevant when loaded).

var2.descr: `y`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left y-coordinate for each container (relevant when loaded).

var3.descr: `load`: List[int] of length n_containers, where load[i]=1 if container i is selected for loading, else 0.

var4.descr: `total_value`: Integer objective value equal to sum(priority[i] * load[i]).
